summary: New `workflow run` subcommand (internal/cli/workflow_run.go): executes a YAML-declared multi-Actor workflow — each step starts an Actor, waits, normalizes + persists items (with optional per-step only_new), then an optional digest block renders to stdout or a file. Records each run to pp_workflow_runs. Registered as a child of the generated `workflow` command.
rationale: Replaces a hand-written orchestration script with one declarative file that an agent can invoke as a single MCP tool.
